raw_title: Reinforcement fine-tuning on Amazon Bedrock with OpenAI-Compatible APIs: a technical walkthrough
raw_content: In this post, we walk through the end-to-end workflow of using RFT on Amazon Bedrock with OpenAI-compatible APIs: from setting up authentication, to deploying a Lambda-based reward function, to kicking off a training job and running on-demand inference on your fine-tuned model.
